args.query: SELECT DISTINCT "Index" FROM index_trade ORDER BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Index" FROM index_trade ORDER BY "Index";

args.query:
SELECT "Index",
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" = "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unchanged_days,
       COUNT(*) AS total_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA')
  AND "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" <= '2018-12-31'
GROUP BY "Index"
ORDER BY "Index";

exec_args.sql:
SELECT "Index",
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" = "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unchanged_days,
       COUNT(*) AS total_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA')
  AND "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" <= '2018-12-31'
GROUP BY "Index"
ORDER BY "Index";

result.preview: "GSPTSE (44 up days, 41 down days) and IXIC (44 up days, 31 down days)."
